Subject: Let's Track Your Progress & Grow Together\n\nBody: Let's Connect & Grow Together A Note From Your Growth Partner Let's Track Your Progress & Grow Together Hi there, This is Sakshi from the Zoca team. I wanted to reach out personall

cause_analysis.narrative: Buckeye Beauty Bar churned on 2026-03-03 after 157 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-12 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 17 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-16 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Invitation: zoca check in @ Mon Feb 16, 2026 1pm - 1:30pm (EST) (buckeyebeautybar@gmail.com)\n\nBody: We ha…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-13 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Let's Track Your Progress & Grow Together\n\nBody: Let's Connect & Grow Together A Note From Your Growth Partne…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
